testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.review: I was terrified of dental procedures, but Dr. [Name] made the entire root canal completely painless. I couldn't believe it! The clinic is so clean and professional. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Rahul Gupta
testimonials.review: Got my dental implant done here. The result looks so natural, nobody can tell the difference. The staff is friendly and the pricing is fair. Best dental clinic in Asansol!

testimonials.name: Meena Das
testimonials.review: My teeth whitening results exceeded my expectations. Just one session and I could see a huge difference. The doctors are very experienced and caring. Will definitely return!

testimonials.name: Amit Banerjee
testimonials.review: Had my wisdom tooth removed here. Zero pain during the procedure and very quick recovery. The doctor explained everything clearly beforehand. Very reassuring experience!

testimonials.name: Sonia Patel
testimonials.review: I brought my 7-year-old daughter for her first dental checkup. The staff was so gentle and patient with her. She actually wants to come back! The clinic is spotless and very child-friendly.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar Singh
testimonials.review: Was suffering from severe tooth pain for weeks. Dr. treated it in a single sitting with a root canal. Absolutely painless! The pricing was also very transparent with no hidden charges.

testimonials.name: Kavita Ghosh
testimonials.review: Got complete dental implants for my upper jaw. The result has been life-changing — I can eat normally again after years. The EMI option made it affordable. Thank you Strong Roots team!

testimonials.name: Debasish Mondal
testimonials.review: Professional service from start to finish. Got teeth cleaning and a filling done in one visit. The hygienists are very thorough. Best dental experience I have had in this area.

faq.question: Is the dental treatment painful?
faq.answer: No! We use modern anesthesia and painless techniques. Most patients are surprised at how comfortable our procedures are. We prioritize your comfort at every step.

faq.question: How much does treatment cost?
faq.answer: Treatment costs vary depending on the procedure. We offer transparent pricing with no hidden charges. Call us or visit for a free consultation and cost estimate. EMI options are also available.

faq.question: How long does the treatment take?
faq.answer: Many procedures like cleanings and fillings are completed in a single visit (30–60 mins). Root canal and implants may take 2–3 visits. We'll give you a clear timeline before starting.

faq.question: Is dental treatment safe for children and elderly?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We provide safe, age-appropriate dental care for patients of all ages — from young children to senior citizens. Our team is trained to handle all patient groups with care.

faq.question: Do I need an appointment or can I walk in?
faq.answer: Both are welcome! Walk-ins are accepted, but we recommend booking an appointment to minimize your waiting time. Call or WhatsApp us to book instantly.
